task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct service request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The request details page is open, and the subject clearly shows 'Office printer not printing - paper jam message'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the resolution entry area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Resolution' tab, section, or dialog box is open and active within the target request.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact required resolution text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Cleared paper path, reset printer firmware. Printer is now operational and all test pages printed successfully.' is visible inside the resolution text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the request status to Resolved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status field or dropdown for the request displays 'Resolved', or there is a success message indicating the request has been resolved and saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to resolve the request.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus interface, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows the correct local or remote URL for ServiceDesk Plus, not a local text editor or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible showing SQL UPDATE commands or database client interfaces being used to change the ticket status or resolution.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target request subject: 'Office printer not printing - paper jam message'. Required resolution text: 'Cleared paper path, reset printer firmware. Printer is now operational and all test pages printed successfully.'. Required new status: 'Resolved'.
